_comment: Copy this to metamint.config.json to configure MetaMint. Every field is optional; omitted fields use the defaults in src/config.js. Environment variables (METAMINT_MODE, METAMINT_PLAN, METAMINT_URL_CRAWL, METAMINT_FEATURES, PORT) override anything here.
_mode: Fork 1 — launch shape. 'server' = client calls /api/generate. 'static' = client runs the engine in-browser, no backend.
_plan: Fork 2 — baseline paid tier: 'free' | 'pro' | 'agency'. Drives feature flags (watermark, brandedTemplates, brandPresets, bulkCsv, api).
_featureOverrides: Flip individual features on regardless of plan, e.g. { "brandedTemplates": true } to ship one Pro feature early.
_urlCrawl: Fork 3 — enable the 'import from a live URL' feature (server-side fetch + meta parse). Off by default.

brand.name: MetaMint
brand.tagline: Mint perfect social previews in 30 seconds.
